executive_summary.summary: The website https://plausible.io/ has a performance score of 100 and an accessibility score of 64, indicating some accessibility issues. Opportunities for improvement exist in caching, DOM size optimization, and accessibility.

performance.summary: The page scores 100/100 on performance, with all Core Web Vitals meeting their respective thresholds. Opportunities for improvement exist in caching and DOM size optimization.

findings.evidence: Cache lifetime is not optimized; estimated savings: 14 KiB
findings.impact: Suboptimal cache lifetimes may slow down repeat visits to the page.
findings.recommendation: Implement efficient cache lifetimes to reduce latency on repeat visits.

findings.impact: A large DOM can increase style calculation and layout reflow durations, impacting page responsiveness.
findings.recommendation: Optimize DOM size to improve page responsiveness and reduce memory usage.

accessibility.summary: Automated tooling detects roughly a third of WCAG failures; manual review is required for the categories listed in `manual_review_required`. The site has a score of 64, indicating some accessibility issues.

findings.evidence: No evidence of deprecated ARIA roles or invalid aria-* attributes.
findings.impact: Users of assistive technologies may experience inconsistent behavior due to missing or invalid ARIA attributes.
findings.recommendation: Ensure all ARIA attributes match their roles and are used as specified.

findings.evidence: No evidence of inaccessible command elements or missing input field names.
findings.impact: Users who rely on screen readers may experience difficulty interacting with command elements or input fields without accessible names.
findings.recommendation: Provide accessible names for all command elements and input fields.

findings.evidence: No evidence of missing or invalid `aria-hidden` attributes.
findings.impact: Users of assistive technologies may experience inconsistent behavior due to missing or invalid `aria-hidden` attributes.
findings.recommendation: Ensure all elements with `aria-hidden="true"` do not contain focusable descendents.
